testcase.name: [It] Workload cluster creation Creating a HA cluster [REQUIRED] With 3 control-plane nodes and 2 Linux and 2 Windows worker nodes

failure.message: Timed out after 3600.001s. Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist Expected <int>: 2 to equal <int>: 3
